wf-plan.template: Use the workflow continuity planning command from .opencode/commands/wf-plan.md with these arguments: $ARGUMENTS
wf-plan.description: Clarify ambiguity and write the next strict workflow plan

wf-progress.template: Use the workflow continuity progress command from .opencode/commands/wf-progress.md with these arguments: $ARGUMENTS
wf-progress.description: Record progress, verification evidence, blockers, and next steps

wf-review.template: Use the workflow continuity review command from .opencode/commands/wf-review.md with these arguments: $ARGUMENTS
wf-review.description: Evaluate implementation quality against the plan

wf-docs.template: Use the workflow continuity docs command from .opencode/commands/wf-docs.md with these arguments: $ARGUMENTS
wf-docs.description: Promote confirmed decisions and reusable knowledge

wf-handoff.template: Use the workflow continuity handoff command from .opencode/commands/wf-handoff.md with these arguments: $ARGUMENTS
wf-handoff.description: Write a compact handoff for the next agent

wf-resume.template: Use the workflow continuity resume command from .opencode/commands/wf-resume.md with these arguments: $ARGUMENTS

wf-ralph.template: Use the workflow continuity ralph command from .opencode/commands/wf-ralph.md with these arguments: $ARGUMENTS
wf-ralph.description: Continue strict workflow cycles until complete or escalation is required
